message:
chore: Fix cargo-deny config and remove unused imports

- Update deny.toml: change deprecated 'url' to 'db-urls' array format
- Remove unused 'auth' module import in auth.rs
- Remove unused 'JsonErrorDetail' import in errors.rs
- Remove unused 'Style' and 'trace' imports in progress.rs
- Rename 'agent_mode' to '_agent_mode' to indicate reserved field

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ targets = [
 # The path where the advisory database is cloned/fetched into
 db-path = "~/.cargo/advisory-db"
 # Use the RustSec advisory database
-url = "https://github.com/rustsec/advisory-db"
+db-urls = ["https://github.com/rustsec/advisory-db"]
 # Check for yanked crates
 yanked = "warn"
 # Ignore specific advisories (keep this list minimal!)
